name: Anastasia
description:
Hi! (I swear I’m taking a break for a few days, I swear.) 

I’m currently working on a new series, and I would love your opinions! 

1) Do you want to see nice, sweet men who worship you and are completely obsessed with you and only you? 

2) Or do you want to see those asshole men who will mentally (possibly physically) treat you like shit? 

Leave me reviews, loves. 

Also, 860 followers! `You like me, you really like me!` *wipes tear off cheek while holding a cheap dollar trophy.* Okay, byeeeee! 

(Alaska voice if you watch RuPaul!)
creator: anawright93
